Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Witnesses]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 1''' — A pair of Witnesses wants to hire Calder to take them to an island and withdraw a relic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Witnesses are a group that Calder and Andel are interacting with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Calder has past experience with Witnesses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — The Witnesses kept a tight grip on their weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 4''' — The Witnesses are one of the Imperial Guilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — The Witnesses are tired.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 6''' — Witnesses are a group that has worked with the Blackwatch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 6''' — Witnesses can relive recorded memories by burning specific candles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 17''' — The Guards are serving the Witnesses.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — The Witnesses is a group that Naberius Clayborn works for.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 5''' — Zhen told the prisoner to save his biography for the Witnesses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Shera has killed Witnesses before.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — The Guild discourages relationships between Witnesses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — There were two Witnesses present.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The Witnesses can be used to investigate news reports.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The Witnesses can verify or deny any story put out.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — The Palace dungeon checkpoint includes a pair of Witnesses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 18''' — The Witnesses published an article exonerating the Imperialist Guilds for attacks conducted in pursuit of justice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 18''' — The Witnesses are responsible for issuing the public declaration of the Champions' dissolution.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — The Witnesses investigate claims of wrongdoing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 10''' — Witnesses can Read clothing and weaponry to provide notarized testimony.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 11''' — Witnesses can verify testimony and support alliances.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — Andel is looking for a position with the Witnesses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Witnesses can provide testimony regarding the actions of Regents and the Imperial Steward.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — The Witnesses are silently observing.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — The Witnesses act as neutral arbitrators.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Witnesses can collaborate on creating boxes to seal Vessels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Witnesses work in pairs consisting of a Chronicler and a Silent One.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Both sets of Witnesses were still alive in the tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — The Witnesses report on the deaths of Guild Heads.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — The Witnesses are the hope from the events of today.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — The Witnesses are a guild that speaks the unvarnished truth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — The twin Witnesses are one of the Guild Heads Bareius suggests should not be assassinated.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
